Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Given the conflicting instruction, I will provide a dictionary with estimated times based on typical supply chain durations. I will use seconds as the unit, as in the example.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The process activities: SS, OP, RC, QI, CA, PT, PK, WS, DT, AS. Typically, the process flow is: SS -> OP -> RC -> QI -> CA -> PT -> PK -> WS -> DT -> AS.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I will include a subset of pairs, focusing on pairs that are separated by multiple steps. For example, from SS to RC, from SS to QI, etc.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For non-adjacent pairs, average time is the sum of the averages of the intermediate steps, and standard deviation is the square root of the sum of variances assuming independence. For example, SS to RC: average 691200, stdev 178160.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Computing for all listed pairs using the method: SS to AS: 1598400, 242473; OP to AS: 1512000, 238595; and so on for RC, QI, CA, PT, PK, WS pairs.
